<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/preferences/lastfm/disconnect"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Removes the Last.fm session key and disconnects the integration. Returns an HTML fragment.

  parameters={undefined}
>
